indicators: outbound HTTP request initiated by app pod to http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/iam/security-credentials/
request appears in URL parameter of /api/v2/fetch?url=http://169.254.169.254/
response payload contains AWS-style temporary credential JSON
summary: SSRF attempt targeting AWS instance metadata service. Application appears to take a user-controlled URL parameter without server-side validation.
